text: Morning Jarvis, help me plan my day. What's on the calendar?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, October 26. No work meetings today. You have neighborhood BBQ at Dave's place and Lily's swim lesson at the aquatic center.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. Sounds exciting! That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Bedtime can be a challenge. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Setting my fantasy football lineup. It was a really interesting history episode. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. Good way to wrap up the day. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that reading scientific papers late tonight. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hosted a game night at our place. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Neighborhood connections are fun. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Just wanted to mention that putting together our grocery list. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: I've got the grocery list ready. Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that doing some cleaning around the house. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. Let's get that resolved. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Ethan is practicing Für Elise for the upcoming piano recital. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Busy day for sports! He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Screen time is always a negotiation. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Listening to a podcast in the garage. My starting running back is questionable. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Relaxation mode active. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. I checked the telemetry feeds. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Hosted a game night at our place. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. Neighborhood connections are fun. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: Planning our weekly meals today. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. I've got the grocery list ready. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Checking on some house maintenance items. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Good call on checking that. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, logging my evening reflection. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
